case_title: CHICA STELLA M VS MOLINA JUAN ANTONIO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY CHICA STELLA M AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA JUAN ANTONIO MOLINA JOSEFA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO JUAN ANTONIO MOLINA, ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
CERT MAIL TO CALIF SUNROOMS RETURNED SIGNED.
CERT MAIL TO JOSEFA MOLINA RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHICA STELLA M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOLINA JUAN ANTONIO MOLINA JOSEFA $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,025.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOT. OF JUDGM. SENT TO MOLINA RETURNED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $500.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $199.99 ACCRUED INTEREST, $32.56 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA JUAN ANTONIO
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA JUAN ANTONIO MOLINA JOSEFA
WRIT ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY AS TO DEFEN. RETURNED PARTIALLY SATISFIED $1873.86.
AMENDED WRIT RECEIVED FROM C. COSTA SHERIFF'S STATING WRIT WAS FULLY SATISFIED AS OF 8-31-95. THEREFORE MEMOC FILED FOR $50 ON 4-16-96 WAS
DELETED FROM FILING, 'CAUSE NOT VALID, ONCE JUDGMENT WAS FULLY COLLECTED.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,879.78 AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA JUAN ANTONIO MOLINA JOSEFA
